overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game set in ancient Egypt, showing a character parkouring through a torchlit city at night. The character traverses mud-brick alleyways, climbs onto rooftops with burning braziers, and descends through courtyards before encountering mounted soldiers near a city gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: mud brick courtyard and narrow alleyways

agents.ego_description: running through narrow alleyways between mud brick walls and approaching stone stairs

entered.detail: tall weathered mud brick walls enclosing the courtyard area
simple wooden tables and benches arranged in the courtyard
stone steps leading upward between the buildings
tall palm trees visible above the rooftops in the distance
large metal bowl with flames providing warm torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a torchlit mud brick courtyard at night, passing wooden market tables and entering a narrow alleyway. The stone stairs ahead lead upward between the weathered walls, with palm trees visible silhouetted against the dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated street with painted mud brick buildings

events.description: character climbs onto rooftop terrace from the stairs

agents.ego_description: running up stone stairs and climbing onto the rooftop terrace

notable_agents.action: civilian walking up the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: two-story building with distinctive red and white painted trim around doors and windows
flat elevated stone platform with low perimeter walls
low stone balustrade along the edge of the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs past a painted mud brick residence with red trim, reaching an elevated rooftop terrace. A civilian walks ahead on the stairs as the character climbs onto the roof level, where a burning brazier provides flickering illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop terrace with burning braziers overlooking the city

events.description: character pauses at rooftop edge to look down at the courtyard below

agents.ego_description: traversing the rooftop terraces, looking down at the streets and courtyards below

entered.detail: large spreading tree with dense dark foliage visible from above
tall stone columns of a temple or monumental building in the distance
fortified stone walls marking the city boundary

segments.scene_description: From the elevated rooftop, the character explores the open terrace with burning braziers, looking out over the ancient city. The view encompasses distant temple columns, city walls, and the canopy of an acacia tree below, with the dark blue night sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow descending passage between mud brick walls

events.description: character descends from rooftop back to ground level via stone stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing down from the rooftop and moving through a lower courtyard

notable_agents.action: civilian sitting on the ground near the wall

entered.detail: small enclosed garden area with plants and trees between buildings
wooden market stall with fabric awning and stacked goods

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the rooftop back to ground level through a narrow stone passage, entering a lower courtyard. A civilian sits against the wall while the character moves past a market stall with a fabric awning toward an open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with gate arch and mounted soldiers

events.description: group of mounted soldiers on horses enters view through the city gate archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the alley toward the city gate where armed soldiers are approaching

notable_agents.action: mounted soldiers on horses riding through the city gate archway

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the entrance to the city district
group of soldiers riding horses or camels through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wider street approaching a city gate archway. As the character moves forward, a group of mounted soldiers on horses enters through the gate, creating a tense encounter in the torchlit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torchlit Egyptian city, ascending from narrow mud-brick alleyways to an elevated rooftop before descending back into a tense street encounter. It begins in a courtyard filled with wooden market tables, moving through a narrow alley and up stone stairs that lead past a red-trimmed residence. As the character reaches the rooftop terrace, the perspective opens up to reveal a panoramic view of distant temple columns and city walls under a dark blue night sky illuminated by flickering braziers. The scene then shifts downward through a narrow stone passage and back into a lower courtyard, passing a seated civilian and fabric-awning stalls. Finally, the camera emerges from the confined alley into a wide street, moving toward a city gate archway just as a group of mounted soldiers enters the frame.
